name: Mws-Bread with Honey, Oat Bran and Teff Wip
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
1. In a small bowl, mix water with egg white.
Whisk in 1 Egg White and 1 tbsp Water.
2. Add the egg mixture to the yeast, honey, and Teff.
Stir until dissolved. Mix in Oat Bran.
3. Gradually add flour, stirring continuously.
Knead on a well-floured surface until smooth,
about 8 minutes.
4. Place dough in an oiled bowl. Cover with plastic wrap.
Let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 45 minutes.
5. Punch down the dough and divide into two loaves if desired.
Shape each loaf and place in greased loaf pans.
Cover and let rise again until doubled, about 45 minutes.
6. Brush tops of loaves with egg mixture and sprinkle with Oat Bran.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes on a baking stone or in the bread pan,
until golden brown. For an even crustier top, spray with water
at intervals or place a pie pan filled with boiling water
in the lower rack of the oven.
Makes one or two loaves, each about 18 1/2 inch slices.
